hasAttributes.name: createdOn
hasAttributes.description: Shows the date and time when the customer relationship was created. The date and time are displayed in the time zone selected in Microsoft Dynamics 365 options.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedOn
hasAttributes.description: Shows the date and time when the record was last updated. The date and time are displayed in the time zone selected in Microsoft Dynamics 365 options.

hasAttributes.name: customerRoleId
hasAttributes.description: Choose the primary party's role or nature of the relationship the customer has with the second party. The field is read-only until both parties have been selected. Administrators can configure role values under Business Management in the Settings area.

hasAttributes.name: customerRelationshipId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the customer relationship.

hasAttributes.name: createdBy
hasAttributes.description: Shows who created the record.

hasAttributes.name: ownerId
hasAttributes.description: Owner Id

hasAttributes.name: ownerIdType
hasAttributes.description: The type of owner, either User or Team.

hasAttributes.name: partnerId
hasAttributes.description: Select the secondary account or contact involved in the customer relationship.

hasAttributes.name: partnerIdType
hasAttributes.description: The type of partner, either Account or Contact.

hasAttributes.name: owningBusinessUnit
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the business unit that owns the customer relationship.

hasAttributes.name: converseRelationshipId
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the converse relationship of the customer relationship.

hasAttributes.name: partnerRoleId
hasAttributes.description: Choose the secondary party's role or nature of the relationship the customer has with the primary party. The field is read-only until both parties have been selected. Administrators can configure role values under Business Management in the Settings area.

hasAttributes.name: customerRoleDescription
hasAttributes.description: Type additional information about the primary party's role in the customer relationship, such as the length or quality of the relationship.

hasAttributes.name: customerId
hasAttributes.description: The customer account or contact to provide a quick link to additional customer details, such as account information, activities, and opportunities.

hasAttributes.name: customerIdType
hasAttributes.description: The type of customer, either Account or Contact.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedBy
hasAttributes.description: Shows who last updated the record.

hasAttributes.name: partnerRoleDescription
hasAttributes.description: Type additional information about the secondary party's role in the customer relationship, such as the length or quality of the relationship.

hasAttributes.name: owningUser
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the user who owns the customer relationship.

hasAttributes.name: overriddenCreatedOn
hasAttributes.description: Date and time that the record was migrated.

hasAttributes.name: importSequenceNumber
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the data import or data migration that created this record.

hasAttributes.name: createdOnBehalfBy
hasAttributes.description: Shows who created the record on behalf of another user.

hasAttributes.name: modifiedOnBehalfBy
hasAttributes.description: Shows who created the record on behalf of another user.

hasAttributes.name: owningTeam
hasAttributes.description: Unique identifier of the team who owns the customer relationship.

definitions.description: Relationship between a customer and a partner in which either can be an account or contact.
